roa.docketEntryComment: Client Reported to CCU and Paid in Full

Decision Remittitur - We conclude petitioner's pretrial detention in excess of his maximum potential sentence on a charge of assault with a semiautomatic firearm under section 245, subdivision (b), was excessive in relation to the government's public safety goals and thus constituted impermissible punishment in violation of petitioner's due process rights. However, as a result of petitioner's guilty plea and release on his own recognizance, we need not provide further relief and instead dismiss the petition as moot.

However, as a result of petitioner's guilty plea and release on his own recognizance, we need not provide further relief and instead dismiss the petition as moot.
docket_entries.description: Decision Remittitur - We conclude petitioner's pretrial detention in excess of his maximum potential sentence on a charge of assault with a semiautomatic firearm under section 245, subdivision (b), was excessive in relation to the government's public safety goals and thus constituted impermissible punishment in violation of petitioner's due process rights. However, as a result of petitioner's guilty plea and release on his own recognizance, we need not provide further relief and instead dismiss the petition as moot.
